name: brickwright-lite
description: A fully-permissive (BSD-3 / Apache-2.0 / MIT) Brickwright — a contained fork of the pre-relicense Scratch stack you can bundle and ship on any app store, with blocks⇄code⇄Python/JS and LEGO extensions.

scripts.postvendor: echo 'Vendored the pinned permissive sources into packages/. Now: npm install && npm run build:gui'
